<sentence>These petals are frequently delicate and somewhat translucent, complementing the boldness of the corona filaments.</sentence>
<sentence>The entire structure is supported by a sturdy stem, and it typically grows on a vine, with tendrils that help it climb.</sentence>
<sentence>The overall impression is one of intricate, symmetrical beauty, almost like a celestial clock or a miniature solar system.</sentence>
